project.name: build-same-engine
project.description: Dual-mode website build engine (clone or generate) with a canonical capability registry, single V4 runtime, and runtime-learning loop.

nodes.name: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-09-canonical-discovery-research-scraping-content-pipeline.md
nodes.summary: 2026 07 09 canonical discovery research scraping content pipeline (docs/superpowers/plans)

nodes.name: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-09-tech-stack-planner-and-enhanced-renderer.md
nodes.summary: 2026 07 09 tech stack planner and enhanced renderer (docs/superpowers/plans)

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Project manifest for the Build-Same engine: dependency graph, scripts, and build configuration.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level documentation describing the dual-mode clone/generate build engine and its agent-driven pipeline.

nodes.name: scripts/verify-runtime-9-industries.ts
nodes.summary: Runtime verification harness: proves the convergence contract (all trace layers closed, manifest present, graph audit passes) across 9 industries and promotes V4 to default on 9/9.

nodes.name: src/agents/deterministic-orchestrator-v4.ts
nodes.summary: The single canonical production runtime. Emits runtime-trace.json, capability-manifest.json and capability-coverage.json; records runtime-learning candidate capabilities.

nodes.name: src/agents/runtime-trace.ts
nodes.summary: RuntimeTracer produces a per-layer RuntimeTrace (validation, evidence, dependencies) persisted to .build-artifacts/runtime-trace.json.

nodes.name: src/bos/candidate/store.ts
nodes.summary: Persistence for runtime-learning candidate knowledge (git-ignored store).

nodes.name: src/bos/candidate/types.ts
nodes.summary: Candidate knowledge types: runtime learning writes ONLY here; candidates flow through validation → confidence → promotion before touching the Business Graph.

nodes.name: src/bos/capabilities/index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel for the canonical capability registry consumed by every pipeline stage.

nodes.name: src/bos/capabilities/registry-data.ts
nodes.summary: CANONICAL_CAPABILITIES: ~55 canonical capability ids with aliases, dependency graph, industries, and primitive-pack tags.

nodes.name: src/bos/capabilities/registry.ts
nodes.summary: CapabilityRegistry: normalize/resolve (transitive dependency + industry expansion), coverageScore, buildManifest, and scaleCapabilities.

nodes.name: src/bos/capabilities/types.ts
nodes.summary: Canonical capability types: Capability, ResolvedCapabilities, CapabilityManifest (capability-manifest@1).

nodes.name: src/bos/components/component-library.ts
nodes.summary: COMPONENT_LIBRARY: canonical components linked to capability ids with schema/behavior/renderer/eval/experience hooks; getComponentsForCapabilities resolves via the registry.

nodes.name: src/bos/components/index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel for the canonical component library.

nodes.name: src/bos/knowledge/primitive-packs/composer.ts
nodes.summary: Primitive Pack Composer: composes 8-dimension knowledge packs and bridges to capability ids.

nodes.name: src/bos/learning/promotion.ts
nodes.summary: Aggregates high-confidence candidate knowledge into reviewable capability ontology suggestions (alias/dependency) without mutating the registry.

nodes.name: src/engine/build-queue.ts
nodes.summary: Queues and dispatches build requests to the canonical V4 runtime.

nodes.name: src/engine/runtime-mode.ts
nodes.summary: Runtime promotion gate: getRuntimeMode returns V4 (canonical default); promoteToDefault writes the durable runtime-mode marker.

nodes.name: src/generation/architect.ts
nodes.summary: Legacy Orchestrator architect: capability→page/section mapping (deprecated path; canonical path is V4).

nodes.name: src/generation/primitives.ts
nodes.summary: Primitive selection: getPrimitivesForCapabilities normalizes inputs through the capability registry before mapping to primitive categories.

nodes.name: src/orchestration/artifact-graph/v4-adapter.ts
nodes.summary: Reconstructs an ArtifactGraph from a persisted RuntimeTrace; runs V4 then audits the graph. The reconciled V4/ArtifactGraph path.

nodes.name: src/orchestration/artifact-graph/validation.ts
nodes.summary: Runtime graph validation: critical cycle/duplicate-ownership checks fail the build; warnings for unreachable/dead/orphan.

nodes.name: src/orchestration/experience-intelligence/experience-profiles.ts
nodes.summary: Experience profiles driven by canonical capability ids (emotion/motion/hover biases).

nodes.name: src/orchestration/experience-os/index.ts
nodes.summary: ExperienceOS v2 — aspirational target architecture (deprecated; do NOT delete).

nodes.name: src/orchestration/production-acceptance-gate/engine.ts
nodes.summary: Production acceptance gate; checkCapabilityCoverage consumes the canonical capability manifest and scores via the registry.

nodes.name: src/server.ts
nodes.summary: Production HTTP entry point. POST /api/command routes to the BuildQueue and DeterministicOrchestratorV4; /api/build-anything routes to V4 with legacy fallback.

nodes.name: src/taxonomy/default-taxonomy.ts
nodes.summary: Default industry taxonomy used for knowledge-pack classification.

nodes.name: src/taxonomy/resolver.ts
nodes.summary: Knowledge-pack resolver; packCanonicalCapabilities bridges legacy pack aliases/keywords to canonical capability ids.

layers.name: Runtime Agents (canonical V4 orchestrator, runtime trace)
Business Object System (canonical capabilities, components, learning, candidates)
Orchestration (artifact graph, acceptance gate, experience intelligence)
